entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 40S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SPRINKLES IN THE MORNING, THEN A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
